attributes.action: Public no confidence of government demanding a general election with in 50 days
attributes.additional_details: Giving the British people a legal method of removing a sitting government or a constituency MP if that constituency want to petition the scheme via the UGOV petition scheme or a new system possibly linked to digital ID to stop fraud
attributes.background: Put democracy in the hands of voter which will bring honesty transparency and accountability during the term of a parliament to Make party manifestos a legal requirement where elected mps have to carry out there promises otherwise being forced into a by-election within 50 days using petition scheme

rejection.details:
Petitions need to call on the Government or Parliament to take a specific action.

We're not sure exactly what you'd like the Government or Parliament to do.

You could start a new petition explaining clearly what you would like the Government or Parliament to do. For example, you could start a new petition calling for a change to the current system for removing a current MP. You can find out how the current recall petitions to remove MPs work in this House of Commons Library note: https://commonslibrary.parliament.uk/research-briefings/sn05089/

You may wish to sign one of these petitions which are currently open: 

Mandate petitionable new elections if govt has under 25% UK electorate support: https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/754296

Give people a vote of confidence in their MP 18 months after a general election: https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/758722
